cat > /tmp/gen_avatars.sh <<'EOF'
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
cd /Users/kylezhao/Desktop/github/swarming/loveboard
names=(
  bunny bear panda koala fox kitty puppy frog
  hamster tiger cow pig unicorn chick teddy blossom
)
bg=(
  FDF2F8 FFF7ED F0FDF4 EFF6FF FEF2F2 F5F3FF F0F9FF F0FDFA
  FFF1F2 FEFCE8 F0FDF4 FFF7ED EDE9FE F0F9FF FDF2F8 FDF4FF
)
face=(
  F472B6 FB923C 22C55E 60A5FA EF4444 A78BFA 0EA5E9 14B8A6
  FB7185 EAB308 22C55E F97316 8B5CF6 38BDF8 EC4899 C084FC
)
accent=(
  BE185D C2410C 15803D 1D4ED8 B91C1C 6D28D9 0369A1 0F766E
  BE123C A16207 166534 9A3412 5B21B6 0369A1 9D174D 7E22CE
)
for i in "${!names[@]}"; do
  n="${names[$i]}"
  cat > "public/avatars/avatar-${n}.svg" <<SVG
<svg width="96" height="96" viewBox="0 0 96 96" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <rect width="96" height="96" rx="28" fill="#${bg[$i]}"/>
  <circle cx="48" cy="52" r="24" fill="#${face[$i]}"/>
  <circle cx="38" cy="50" r="3" fill="#111827"/>
  <circle cx="58" cy="50" r="3" fill="#111827"/>
  <path d="M39 61c2.5 3 5.5 4 9 4s6.5-1 9-4" fill="none" stroke="#111827" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  <circle cx="33" cy="38" r="8" fill="#${accent[$i]}"/>
  <circle cx="63" cy="38" r="8" fill="#${accent[$i]}"/>
  <circle cx="33" cy="38" r="3" fill="#fff" opacity=".35"/>
  <circle cx="63" cy="38" r="3" fill="#fff" opacity=".35"/>
</svg>
SVG
done
EOF
bash /tmp/gen_avatars.sh

history.command:
set -e
ROOT=/Users/kylezhao/Desktop/github/swarming
SRC=$ROOT/loveboard
DST=$ROOT
sync_file () {
  from="$1"
  to="$2"
  if [ -f "$from" ] && [ -f "$to" ]; then
    cp "$from" "$to"
  fi
}
sync_dir_files () {
  from_dir="$1"
  to_dir="$2"
  if [ -d "$from_dir" ] && [ -d "$to_dir" ]; then
    cp -R "$from_dir"/. "$to_dir"/
  fi
}

sync_file "$SRC/src/components/ui/AvatarImage.tsx" "$DST/src/components/ui/AvatarImage.tsx"
sync_file "$SRC/src/components/dashboard/PetWidget.tsx" "$DST/src/components/dashboard/PetWidget.tsx"
sync_file "$SRC/src/components/dashboard/StreaksWidget.tsx" "$DST/src/components/dashboard/StreaksWidget.tsx"
sync_file "$SRC/src/components/ui/NavBar.tsx" "$DST/src/components/ui/NavBar.tsx"
sync_file "$SRC/src/app/(app)/settings/page.tsx" "$DST/src/app/(app)/settings/page.tsx"
sync_file "$SRC/src/lib/avatars.ts" "$DST/src/lib/avatars.ts"

sync_dir_files "$SRC/public/avatars" "$DST/public/avatars"
sync_dir_files "$SRC/public/icons" "$DST/public/icons"

# Also sync into app/ if monorepo-style frontend lives there
if [ -d "$ROOT/app" ]; then
  sync_file "$SRC/src/components/ui/AvatarImage.tsx" "$ROOT/app/src/components/ui/AvatarImage.tsx"
  sync_file "$SRC/src/components/dashboard/PetWidget.tsx" "$ROOT/app/src/components/dashboard/PetWidget.tsx"
  sync_file "$SRC/src/components/dashboard/StreaksWidget.tsx" "$ROOT/app/src/components/dashboard/StreaksWidget.tsx"

  sync_dir_files "$SRC/public/avatars" "$ROOT/app/public/avatars"
  sync_dir_files "$SRC/public/icons" "$ROOT/app/public/icons"
fi

#!/usr/bin/env bash

names=(bunny bear panda koala fox kitty puppy frog hamster tiger cow pig unicorn chick teddy blossom)
bg=(FDF2F8 FFF7ED F0FDF4 EFF6FF FEF2F2 F5F3FF F0F9FF F0FDFA FFF1F2 FEFCE8 F0FDF4 FFF7ED EDE9FE F0F9FF FDF2F8 FDF4FF)

</svg>
SVG
done
EOF
